title: Python Basics Course
shortDescription: Start Python with a clean beginner path and practical lesson flow.
description: Build Python confidence through syntax, data handling, problem solving, and mini build sessions.

title: Python Projects Lab
shortDescription: Move from syntax to real project-style Python workflows.
description: Apply Python fundamentals to automation, data workflows, debugging, and beginner projects.

title: Python Automation Workshop
shortDescription: Automate boring work with practical Python scripts and utilities.
description: Learn scripting, files, APIs, parsing, and automation patterns for everyday productivity.

title: Python Interview Prep
shortDescription: Revise Python concepts with interview-style lessons and revision loops.
description: Strengthen coding clarity, Python concepts, debugging, and interview problem patterns.

title: Java Foundations Course
shortDescription: Learn Java from setup to core programming confidence.
description: A structured Java starter path covering syntax, OOP, methods, collections, and project thinking.

title: Java OOP Bootcamp
shortDescription: Understand object oriented Java with a project-focused teaching flow.
description: Go deeper into classes, interfaces, encapsulation, inheritance, and clean code habits in Java.

title: Java API Builder
shortDescription: Prepare for backend Java work with databases, APIs, and app structure.
description: Learn the Java habits that lead into APIs, data access, testing, and backend implementation work.

title: Java Interview Track
shortDescription: Refresh Java problem solving and interview-ready coding discussions.
description: Focus on revision, coding patterns, testing awareness, and project explanation for Java interviews.

title: SQL Fundamentals Course
shortDescription: Master core SQL queries and database thinking for beginners.
description: Start with SQL syntax, filtering, grouping, joins, and schema awareness in a clean order.

title: SQL Query Lab
shortDescription: Build real query confidence with reporting and analysis practice.
description: Strengthen joins, subqueries, CTEs, window functions, and query design with business-style tasks.

title: SQL Reporting Studio
shortDescription: Learn analytics-ready SQL patterns for dashboards, reports, and interviews.
description: A practical SQL path covering schema design, performance, reporting logic, and production thinking.

title: HTML and CSS Bootcamp
shortDescription: Build strong web foundations with semantic HTML and polished CSS layouts.
description: A cleaner front-end path through structure, styling, responsive layout, accessibility, and page polish.

title: JavaScript Essentials Course
shortDescription: Learn JavaScript in the context of real UI behavior and modern browser work.
description: Cover syntax, DOM updates, events, forms, and basic app interactions with a clear practical flow.

title: Frontend Foundations Track
shortDescription: Combine HTML, CSS, JS, APIs, and responsive patterns into a professional front-end flow.
description: A fuller web development path focused on structure, APIs, accessibility, performance, and production readiness.

title: Responsive Web Projects
shortDescription: Ship web pages and UI projects that feel polished across devices.
description: Practice responsive design, component styling, structure, and project delivery with frontend mini builds.

title: Full Stack Web Roadmap
shortDescription: See how frontend, backend, deployment, and portfolio readiness connect together.
description: A roadmap-style web track that connects UI work, APIs, deployment, performance, and product thinking.

title: React Foundations Course
shortDescription: Start React with components, JSX, hooks, and structured UI state.
description: Build React fundamentals through components, composition, state, effects, routing, and clean project flow.

title: React Components Deep Dive
shortDescription: Level up component architecture and reusable UI patterns in React.
description: Go beyond basics with composition, context, data loading, architecture, and reusable UI systems.

title: React Projects Lab
shortDescription: Build React apps with routing, forms, state, and deployment practice.
description: A project-first React path covering forms, context, routing, backend integration, and release habits.

title: React State and Routing Track
shortDescription: Understand React application state, routing, and production navigation patterns.
description: A more advanced React course centered on state management, routing, testing, and app architecture.

title: Node.js Fundamentals Course
shortDescription: Start backend development with Node, Express, and server-side basics.
description: Learn the Node runtime, modules, HTTP, Express, routing, middleware, and API design from scratch.

title: Express API Builder
shortDescription: Build practical APIs with routing, middleware, validation, and database access.
description: Focus on Express architecture, API ergonomics, authentication, and backend project structure.

title: Backend Auth and Databases
shortDescription: Connect authentication, persistence, and backend reliability in one learning path.
description: Go deeper on JWT, Prisma, database workflows, validation, and backend security habits.

title: Node Production Patterns
shortDescription: Learn scaling, deployment, observability, and backend production thinking.
description: A production-oriented backend track that covers scaling, monitoring, secure delivery, and real project habits.
